narrative:
Lucas County has 288,414 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.4 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 27.5% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +10.6% D−R vs +19.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
